creative_direction.reasoning: Typography carries headline + subhead + CTA, and the ad's signature move is a visual equation: [Notion mascot circle] + [row of 5 integration logos in white circles]. Logos must be recognizable (Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, Jira, Teams) — composite from brand kit for accuracy. Track B: generate yellow canvas + black frame + the mascot circle + logo-ring row + '+' operator; text overlays on top.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Integration equation: Notion mascot + your stack = Organize Everything.

nano_banana_json.scene: Warm yellow canvas framed by a thick 30px solid black border. Inside: small Notion logo top-center, two-line Title-Case ExtraBold headline, SemiBold sans subhead, horizontal logo-equation row (mascot circle + '+' + 5 tool-logo circles), black CTA pill bottom.

vertical_zones: Top 6%: Notion N logo + wordmark, small
Top 14-42%: two-line Title Case ExtraBold headline
Center 55-72%: horizontal equation row — Notion mascot circle + '+' symbol + 5 tool-logo circles (Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, Jira, Microsoft Teams)

text_elements_in_image.content:
The Collaborative Workspace
with AI Automation
Free 3 Month Trial with Full AI Access ✦

equation_row_spec.notion_mascot_circle: White circle ~120px diameter containing Notion's scribble-line-art mascot face (simple black line drawing of a face with cap/hair)
equation_row_spec.plus_symbol: Black '+' symbol, ~50px, between mascot and logo row
equation_row_spec.logo_ring: 5 white circles (each ~90px diameter) in a tight row, each containing a recognizable tool logo: Slack (multicolor #), GitHub (black Octocat), Google Drive (tri-color triangle), Jira (blue stacked chevrons), Microsoft Teams (purple T)

negative_prompt: no blurred or unrecognizable logos in logo ring

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate yellow canvas + black frame + mascot circle + '+' + 5 white circles with logos + CTA pill shell (no CTA text). All headline/subhead/CTA text overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Warm yellow #FFD63A canvas 1080x1080 with a 30px solid black border frame all four sides. Inside: small Notion N logo + wordmark top-center (6%). In the middle-lower band (y:55-72%): a horizontal equation row composed of — a 120px white circle containing Notion's scribble-line-art face mascot (cap/hair, simple black line face), a black '+' symbol, and 5 tight-together 90px white circles each containing a recognizable software logo (Slack hash in multicolor, GitHub black Octocat, Google Drive tri-color triangle, Jira blue chevrons, Microsoft Teams purple T). Bottom (78-90%): empty black pill-shaped CTA button with no text inside. Upper 14-52% reserved empty yellow space for overlaid text.
negative_prompt: no CTA text inside pill button
text is only allowed inside the small logo circles of the equation row (as part of those brand logos)

elements.content:
The Collaborative Workspace
with AI Automation
Free 3 Month Trial with Full AI Access ✦

assets.name: Notion face mascot
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Notion's scribble-drawn face character: simple black thin-line drawing of a face with slight squiggle hair/cap, cartoon eyes, small mouth, contained in a white 120px circle.

assets.name: Tool logos (Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, Jira, Microsoft Teams)
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Five recognizable software product logos, each on a clean white 90px circle, in a tight horizontal row: Slack (4-color hash), GitHub (black Octocat cat-silhouette), Google Drive (tri-color triangle: blue, yellow, green), Jira (blue stacked chevrons), Microsoft Teams (purple T).
assets.fidelity_confidence: low — image gen often misrenders logos; composite mandatory for production

prompt_writer_training_notes: Third-party logos are the hardest element for image gen to handle correctly — ALWAYS mark fidelity_confidence=low and recommend composite from brand kit. The '+' symbol must be visually prominent and centered — it's the literal concept of the ad. Thick black frame (30px) is a deliberate 'billboard' signal; don't soften it.
